archetype.name: Swiss & High-Contrast
archetype.description: Authority, clarity, truth. Objective, rigid, functional. Color is used strictly to guide action and indicate status (savings/warnings).

design_context: B2B SaaS Dashboard / Admin Panel - Data-heavy, requires high density with maximum clarity.

layout_strategy.spacing_scale: p-2, p-4, p-6. Tightly packed for data correlation.
layout_strategy.alignment: Left-align dense content and tables. Right-align numerical data/currency (₹).
layout_strategy.containers: Max border-radius of 6px (rounded-md). 1px solid borders (border-border). Minimal to no box-shadows (shadow-sm max). Flat, crisp surfaces.

components.buttons: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-md). High contrast. Primary buttons use #0F172A (slate-900). Action/AI buttons use Accent blue. Hover states must explicitly lighten background and maintain text contrast.
components.tables: Dense padding (py-2 px-3). Subtle zebra striping (bg-slate-50/50 on even rows). Sticky headers. Right-aligned numerical columns (Price, Savings).
components.cards: Flat background (surface), 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover adds slight lift (-translate-y-px) and shadow-sm.
components.ai_recommendation_card: Distinct visual treatment. Use 'Tracing Beam' concept or a subtle 1px border of #2563EB with a very faint blue background tint to signify AI intervention. Include confidence score prominently using data_mono font.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form/Input components. Solid borders, clear focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900).
components.icons: Phosphor Icons (dense/developer feel) or lucide-react (default). Use solid variants for active states, linear for inactive.

animations.interactions: Micro-interactions only. 0.2s ease transitions on hover/focus.
animations.page_load: Staggered fade-in for dashboard widgets (Framer Motion).
animations.ai_loading: Textual 'Terminal' style loader or subtle pulsing skeleton rather than generic spinners.

image_urls.description: Logistics and warehouse interior, representing the scale of procurement.
Modern business meeting room, representing enterprise strategy.

media.logos: Use text-based logos or generic Lucide icons (e.g., ShoppingCart, Store, ShoppingBag) for suppliers if actual SVGs are unavailable. DO NOT use dummyimage placeholders.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards. Text on active buttons must be pure white.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, toggles, comparison cards, tab headers) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., `data-testid="search-submit-button"`, `data-testid="supplier-toggle-amazon"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use purely HTML/Tailwind for main layouts; use Shadcn components for complex interactions (Tables, Dropdowns, Tabs, Forms).
Format all currency values in Indian Rupees (₹) using `Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR' })`.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard. Maximize screen real estate. Use a sticky sidebar for navigation.
The AI Recommendation card must stand out visually from generic supplier cards. Give it a subtle blue tint or border, and list the explainable reasons clearly with checkmarks.
Supplier toggle section must use Shadcn Switch components.
Ensure the split-procurement recommendation displays nicely, highlighting which items to buy from which supplier to maximize savings.
Do NOT use Inter for headings. Use Cabinet Grotesk. Use IBM Plex Sans for body.
Ensure all data_testid attributes are correctly injected for end-to-end testing.
